# Web App Source Structure

<!-- Generated by: agent-context-manager.md -->
<!-- Generated on: 2025-10-24 -->
<!-- Source: hybrid -->
<!-- Level: higher-level -->

## Purpose & Scope

The web app source code contains the React 19 frontend implementation including API client layer, feature modules, navigation, shared components, and test utilities. The application uses Vite for build tooling and React Query for data fetching.

## Structure

The web app source is organized into the following structure:

### api/ (API client layer)

- **Location**: `src/api/`
- **Purpose**: GraphQL API client, React Query hooks, query definitions, and selectors
- **Key Components**:
  - `fetch.js` - GraphQL fetch client with authentication
  - `hooks/` - React Query hooks per domain
  - `queries/` - GraphQL query strings by domain
  - `selectors/` - Data transformation and selection utilities
- **Related**: Used by all modules to interact with backend API

### modules/ (feature modules)

- **Location**: `src/modules/`
- **Purpose**: Feature-specific UI implementations organized by business domain
- **Key Modules**:
  - `admin/` - Organization administration features
  - `auth/` - Authentication and password reset
  - `common/` - Shared components, hooks, utilities, and styles
  - `core/` - App shell, routing, and error pages
  - `user/` - User dashboard and service logging features
- **Related**: Each module contains components, containers, scenes (pages), and styles

### navigation/ (routing)

- **Location**: `src/navigation/`
- **Purpose**: Route configuration and navigation utilities
- **Key Files**:
  - `builder.js` - Route tree builder
  - `index.js` - Navigation exports
- **Related**: Uses `@reach/router` for client-side routing

### test-utils/ (test utilities)

- **Location**: `src/test-utils/`
- **Purpose**: Test helpers, mock query utilities, and test setup
- **Key Files**:
  - Mock query builders
  - Test component wrappers
- **Related**: Used by component and integration tests

### types/ (TypeScript type definitions)

- **Location**: `src/types/`
- **Purpose**: Shared TypeScript types and interfaces
- **Key Files**:
  - `ui.d.ts` - UI-specific type definitions
  - `index.d.ts` - General type definitions
- **Related**: Referenced across all modules

## Key Interfaces

- **GraphQL API**: All API communication via `/graphql` endpoint
- **Authentication**: JWT cookie-based authentication
- **React Query**: Data fetching, caching, and state management
- **Component Props**: TypeScript interfaces for component contracts
- **CSS Modules**: `.module.scss` and `.module.css` for scoped styles

## Conventions

- **Module Organization**: Feature-based modules with components, containers, scenes structure
- **Component Structure**:
  - `components/` - Presentational components
  - `containers/` - Connected components with business logic
  - `scenes/` - Full page components
  - `context/` - React context providers
- **Styling**: SCSS modules for scoped styles, shared variables in `common/styles/`
- **File Naming**: PascalCase directories for components, camelCase for utilities
- **Imports**: Absolute imports using path aliases configured in tsconfig
- **Testing**: Component tests co-located with components, Vitest + Testing Library
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, Context API for app state
